original_statement: "France: 1939 Elo rating (3rd), 95% chance of advancing Senegal: 1727 rating (26th), 83% chance of advancing Norway: 1746 rating (23rd), 72% chance of advancing Iraq: 1653 rating (34th), 20% chance of advancing [DTAI Analytics Lab / Elo model via ESPN, 5 June 2026]."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group I qualification probability
statement_context: Excerpt from DTAI Analytics Lab at KU Leuven Elo-based model preview published via ESPN on 2026-06-05. Author Nate Palmer citing 20,000 simulations.
resolution_criteria: Norway qualifies for the knockout stage from Group I in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by finishing in the top two positions according to the official FIFA group stage standings published after all group matches conclude on or before 2026-06-27.
source_text_snippet: France: 1939 Elo rating (3rd), 95% chance of advancing Senegal: 1727 rating (26th), 83% chance of advancing Norway: 1746 rating (23rd), 72% chance of advancing Iraq: 1653 rating (34th), 20% chance of advancing
